name: VelocityEHS Safety Management API
what_it_does: VelocityEHS REST API for enterprise EHS management platform targeting mid-market industrial and manufacturing companies. Enables AI agents to manage safety incident reporting and investigation workflow for safety program management, handle chemical inventory and SDS (Safety Data Sheet) management for hazcom compliance, access industrial hygiene exposure monitoring and sampling data for worker health protection, retrieve environmental compliance monitoring and reporting data, manage safety training completion tracking and certification management, handle ergonomics and musculoskeletal hazard assessment data, access corrective and preventive action (CAPA) tracking for safety improvement, retrieve regulatory compliance status for OSHA, EPA, and REACH obligations, manage safety observation and near-miss reporting data, and integrate EHS data with HR, ERP, and enterprise management systems.
use_cases: Processing safety incidents from EHS automation agents
Managing chemical SDS libraries from hazcom compliance agents
Tracking training certifications from safety compliance agents
Monitoring industrial hygiene exposures from worker health agents
not_for: Process safety and PSM without general EHS and chemical management focus
Enterprise EHSQ without mid-market manufacturing and industrial focus
Consumer safety without industrial and occupational health context
best_when: A mid-market manufacturing, chemicals, or industrial company using VelocityEHS wants AI agents to automate incident tracking, chemical management, training compliance, and regulatory reporting.
avoid_when: SAFETY RISK: Safety incident routing must follow OSHA notification requirements and configured escalation; automated routing without notification chain validation violates regulatory requirements. Chemical SDS data must be current — automated hazcom programs using outdated SDS creates worker safety risk. Industrial hygiene exposure action level automation requires certified industrial hygienist review.

auth.notes: VelocityEHS uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. Per-tenant credentials. Integration documentation at velocityehs.com. Webhooks for EHS event notifications. REST API with JSON. Chicago, Illinois HQ. Strong in mid-market manufacturing, chemicals, and food processing. Chemical management (SDS) module differentiator. MSDSonline (SDS library) acquired.

pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription; module count and employee count determine pricing; chemical management module separate
pricing.notes: Chicago, Illinois. Founded 2001. Private. Mid-market EHS software market. 10,000+ customers. Chemical management (MSDSonline) module for SDS library management. Strong in food & beverage, chemicals, and manufacturing. Competes with Cority and Intelex for mid-market EHS market.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in integration portal

known_agent_gotchas: SAFETY RISK: OSHA incident notification requirements (hospitalization, fatality) have strict deadlines; automated incident routing must validate notification chain before triggering
SDS currency requirement — hazcom SDS must be current manufacturer SDS; automated SDS programs must handle version updates and obsolete SDS removal
Chemical inventory accuracy — automated chemical inventory management must handle additions and removals; stale inventory data creates OSHA Right-to-Know and SARA Title III compliance issues
Industrial hygiene action levels — automated alerts at OEL/PEL action levels require certified industrial hygienist to validate exposure and recommend controls
Module licensing — VelocityEHS EHS, chemical management, and IH modules are separately licensed; verify module access before building integrations

OSHA 300 recordability — automated incident classification for OSHA recordability requires consistent application of OSHA 300 criteria; incorrect classification has regulatory and workers' comp implications
agent_readiness.security_notes: EHS and chemical management. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2/API key. US/EU. Safety incident and chemical inventory data.

security_score_components.security_notes: EHS safety management. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Safety and chemical data.
